sections.paragraph:
Original: עזרה

Transliteration: ‛ăzârâh

Phonetic: az-aw-raw'

BDB Definition:

  1. enclosure
    1. ledge (surrounding Ezekiel's altar)
    2. court (outer one of temple)

Origin: from H5826 in its original meaning of surrounding

TWOT entry: 1599a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
